name: I have no docs of my injury at work in Boise—too late?

mainEntity.name: I have no docs of my injury at work in Boise—too late?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Not if under 180 days equivalent; reconstruct with medical, affidavits.** Report now.[1][4] Key factors: Doctor reports, timeline key. Act fast to build case. Many succeed without initial docs.
